# Autom8ion Lab

> SDVOSB-Certified · SBA-Certified · VA Vets First. Veteran-owned engineering firm building bespoke AI/LLM agents, custom software, managed services, and cybersecurity for federal, state, and enterprise mission environments. Compliance is built in from day one, not bolted on.

Autom8ion Lab — operated by Sitehues Media Inc. — engineers production AI/LLM systems, workflow automation, and custom software for environments where security architecture and compliance documentation must be engineered from day one. We work inside CMMC 2.0, NIST 800-171, NIST 800-53, FedRAMP, HIPAA, SOC 2, FCRA, HUD, and CIS frameworks. Most custom builds ship discovery-to-live-launch in 30 days; CMMC remediation runs 4–9 months; FedRAMP-aligned builds run 6+ months. All CUI is handled on US-based systems only.

## Headline Telemetry

- **30 days** from discovery to live launch on most custom builds
- **90%** manual matching eliminated via AI normalization (AI hospital inventory normalization, Intermed · 150K+ record ETL)
- **300%** data processing speed gain (multi-tenant OpenSearch on construction/BIM datasets)
- **<1 second** RAG query response across 500K+ documents (Conduit RAG Engine)
- **95%** staff retention · 48-hour average placement
- **20+** specialists placed (devs, QA, DevOps, data eng.)

## Core Capabilities Ecosystem (6 Domains, 1 Unified Architecture)

- [Custom AI & LLMs](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/custom-llm-systems): RAG engines, NLP pipelines, agentic architectures, LLM fine-tuning. Local LLM systems for HIPAA, CMMC, FedRAMP, and FISMA environments. No external data transfer.
- [AI Agent Development](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/ai-agent-development): Custom AI agents that execute multi-step tasks, not just chat. Trained on your data, deployed in your environment, audit-ready from day one.
- [Workflow Automation](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/workflow-automation): Enterprise workflow automation with n8n, Python, and custom integrations. For teams that have outgrown Zapier and need real business logic.
- [Custom API Integrations](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/api-integrations): RESTful, GraphQL, webhooks, and enterprise middleware. ETL pipelines, BigQuery, OpenSearch, PostHog. 150K+ record processing pipelines.
- [Custom Software Development](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/software-development): Full-stack custom software for SaaS, enterprise, and regulated environments. Python, Node.js, React, Matlab, FastAPI, iOS, Android. Security architecture and compliance documentation built in from day one.
- [Cloud & Infrastructure](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/cloud-systems): AWS, Azure, Kubernetes. CI/CD and container orchestration. FedRAMP-aligned hosting, GovCloud architecture. Designed for compliance from day one.
- [Cybersecurity Compliance](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/cybersecurity): CMMC 2.0, NIST 800-171, HIPAA, SOC 2, and CIS-aligned readiness. Pen testing, vulnerability remediation, Zero Trust architecture. We are not a CMMC RPO or C3PAO — we engineer the controls and document them, then work alongside your assessor or a partner C3PAO.
- [Engineering Staff Augmentation](https://autom8ionlab.com/join-us): Devs, QA, DevOps, data engineering. 48-hour average placement. 95% retention. 20+ specialists placed.

## Hub Index Pages

- [All Solutions](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions)
- [All Industries](https://autom8ionlab.com/industries)
- [Engineering Insights (Blog)](https://autom8ionlab.com/blog)
- [Capability Statement](https://autom8ionlab.com/capability-statement)

## Industries Served

- [Construction](https://autom8ionlab.com/industries/construction): Site-to-office AI workflows. Automate RFIs, submittals, OSHA reporting, certified payroll, and the integration gaps between Procore, Sage, and your field apps.
- [Healthcare & Life Sciences](https://autom8ionlab.com/industries/healthcare): HIPAA-compliant AI agents and LLM systems. Referral automation, prior-auth automation, EHR integration (Epic, Cerner, Athena, eClinicalWorks, NextGen), FDA 21 CFR Part 11 systems. PHI never leaves your boundary.
- [Finance](https://autom8ionlab.com/industries/finance): Custom AI for portfolio analytics, PE data normalization, SOX-aligned automation. SOC 2 and bank-level security from day one. Core banking integrations (Fiserv, Jack Henry, FIS) for community banks, credit unions, fintech, and insurers.
- [Real Estate & Property Management](https://autom8ionlab.com/industries/real-estate-property): AI agents for lead capture, lead-to-lease automation, FCRA-compliant tenant screening, HUD compliance, and PMS integrations across Yardi, AppFolio, RealPage, Buildium, MRI, and Entrata.
- [US Federal, State & Local Government](https://autom8ionlab.com/industries/government): Custom AI, automation, and software for civilian agencies, state IT, and municipal IT. FedRAMP-aligned, FISMA, NIST 800-53, StateRAMP-ready.
- [Defense Industrial Base](https://autom8ionlab.com/industries/defense): CMMC 2.0 readiness, NIST 800-171 implementation, and audit-ready documentation for DoD primes and subcontractors.

## Comparison Pages

- [Autom8ion Lab vs n8n Cloud](https://autom8ionlab.com/compare/autom8ion-lab-vs-n8n-cloud): Custom n8n hosting + custom Python nodes vs managed n8n SaaS, for buyers who already chose n8n and want a partner.
- [Custom Build vs Zapier vs Make vs n8n](https://autom8ionlab.com/compare/custom-build-vs-zapier-make-n8n): When the no-code platforms hit their ceiling — task-tax, security, scale, and customization tradeoffs.
- [Autom8ion Lab vs Generic AI Consultancy](https://autom8ionlab.com/compare/autom8ion-lab-vs-generic-ai-consultancy): Engineering shop vs advisory consultancy vs Big-4 firm. SDVOSB Certified · veteran-owned · founder-led delivery.

## Compliance by Default

NIST 800-171 · NIST 800-53 · CIS Aligned · SOC 2 Aligned · CMMC Level 2 Ready · FedRAMP Aligned · HIPAA / HITECH · FDA 21 CFR Part 11 · PCI-DSS · FCRA · HUD (50059, MOR, EIV, REAC) · FFIEC · Section 508

## NAICS Coverage (10 Codes)

- **541511** Custom Computer Programming — bespoke software, mobile apps, AI agents
- **541512** Computer Systems Design — cloud architecture, BI/analytics
- **541519** Other Computer Services — AI/ML consulting, RAG engines
- **541715** R&D — Engineering Sciences
- **541515** Computer Security Services
- **518210** Data Processing & Hosting — ETL, cloud hosting
- **511210** Software Publishers — SaaS platforms
- **561320** Temporary Help Services — staff augmentation
- **541990** Compliance / NIST Services
- **541690** Scientific & Technical Consulting

## Target Contract Vehicles

- GSA MAS 54151S / HACS 54151HACS
- CIO-SP4 SDVOSB Pool (NITAAC)
- OASIS+ SB / SDVOSB Pool
- AFWERX Open Topic SBIR
- VA Vets First · FL & NM Veteran Preference

## Registrations & Certifications

- SAM.gov Active
- SDVOSB SBA Certified
- FL MFMP Registered
- NM SPD Registered
- GSA MAS 54151S — applied
- GSA HACS — applied

## Set-Aside Advantage

3–6 bidders per SDVOSB / VA Vets First set-aside vs. 15+ bidders in open competition. Substantially improves win probability for qualifying scopes.

## Engagement Models

We scope work to your contract structure — single-system task orders, multi-year IDIQ and BPA arrangements, fixed-price commercial engagements, time-and-materials advisory work, or commercial MSAs. Quotes are scope-driven and provided after a discovery call.

## The Autom8ion Blueprint (vs Generic Software)

- **Purpose-built automation** around your workflows, data, and scale — not generic bolted-on software
- **AI-native from day one** — production LLM pipelines and agentic systems, not basic chatbot plugins
- **SOC 2-aligned, NIST/CIS, CMMC L2 ready, private cloud** — not standard protocols with optional security
- **Vetted senior staff · 48-hour placement · 95% retention** — not unvetted freelancers

## Differentiators

- SDVOSB Certified, SBA Certified, VA Vets First
- Software builders with in-house cybersecurity compliance arm
- Engineered for audit from day one — not retrofitted
- Multi-vertical experience: construction, healthcare, finance, real estate, government, defense, tech scaling
- Founder-led: senior engineering access on every engagement
- Dual-shore delivery (Florida & New Mexico, US + Montreal, QC)

## Past Performance (Real-World Telemetry)

- **AI hospital inventory normalization** (Intermed) — 150K+ record ETL · 90% manual work eliminated
- **Multi-tenant OpenSearch on construction/BIM datasets** — 300% data processing speed gain
- **Conduit RAG Engine across 500K+ document corpus** — sub-second query response time
- **Engineering staff augmentation** — 20+ specialists placed (devs, QA, DevOps) · 48-hour turnaround · 95% retention

Many engagements are NDA-governed; details and references provided after a qualifying conversation.
